ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS POODLES, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, PATRICK & FRIENDS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Omnibus Motion To Compel Defendants Michael Ina, Sherman Wong, And Lawrence Bennett To Provide Verified Responses To Discovery, Motion To Deem Facts Admitted, And Motion For Sanctions:

Plaintiff's motion is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART, as follows:

1. Plaintiff's motion to have their Requests for Admission, Set One, deemed admitted is DENIED.

2. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One and Requests for Production of Documents, Set One is GRANTED only to the extent that Defendants must provide verified responses without objections to be served within twenty (20) days after notice of entry of this order. And 10 days after service, defendants are to produce responsive documents.

3. Plaintiff's motion for sanctions is GRANTED. Sanctions are assessed at $4698.75 (50% of requested amount) against Defendants MICHAEL INA, SHERMAN WONG and LAWRENCE BENNETT and their counsel Paul R. Perdue, jointly and severally. Said sanctions to be paid within twenty (20) days after notice of entry of this order to Plaintiff POODLES, INC. and its counsel.
